query:
UPDATE proxy_managers
           SET name         = COALESCE(?, name),
               host         = COALESCE(?, host),
               api_base_url = COALESCE(?, api_base_url),
               api_username = COALESCE(?, api_username),
               api_password = COALESCE(?, api_password),
               is_active    = COALESCE(?, is_active)
           WHERE id = ?
